event_blocks.summary: The Narrator introduces "America!" as the Pig family watches a cartoon about winning a trip to Hollywood. Mummy Pig finds a golden ticket in a potato, leading to their journey to America. Miss Rabbit pilots the airplane, humorously asking if anyone knows where America is before landing in a bustling city. The Pig family exits the airport and is greeted by Miss Rabbit, now a taxi driver, who takes them on a tour of New York City instead of Hollywood. Peppa marvels at the tall buildings as they exit the taxi, and Miss Rabbit, the Rabbit Driver, takes them to the Empire State Building. Inside an elevator, Miss Rabbit, now in a yellow coat and top hat, ascends with them to a rooftop, where Peppa observes the Statue of Liberty through a telescope while Daddy Pig expresses his fear of heights. The Rabbit Driver then rushes them back to the yellow taxi, passing a green bus with a lion driver, and they continue their tour of the vibrant city.

Yellow Packet with Star.description: A bright yellow packet featuring a large star, held by Mummy Pig in the kitchen, which Daddy Pig excitedly identifies as the 'golden ticket'.

George Pig.description: A small pink pig in a blue shirt, seen walking with his family and holding an ice cream cone on the rooftop.

Banana Superhero.description: A cartoon banana character wearing a blue mask and yellow cape, performing heroic actions on TV, whose show features a booming voice promoting a trip to Hollywood and America.

Daddy Pig.description: A large pink pig wearing glasses and a teal shirt, seen walking with his family, standing on the rooftop, and reboarding the taxi. He has a deep male voice and expresses nervousness about heights ('Oh, I can't look,' 'Oh!') and surprise at leaving ('Oh, going already?').

Mummy Pig.description: A pink pig in an orange dress, seen walking with her family, standing on the rooftop, and reboarding the taxi.

Rabbit Pilot.description: A white rabbit with long ears, wearing a blue hat with a feather and a yellow uniform, piloting the airplane with a cheerful expression, speaking in an enthusiastic, slightly high-pitched male voice as he communicates with ground control and bids the Pig family farewell.

Peppa Pig.description: A young pink pig in a red dress, seen walking with her family, holding an ice cream cone on the rooftop, and looking through the telescope. She has a high-pitched, excited child's voice, expressing wonder ('Wow!', 'The buildings are so tall!', 'Ooh, we're so high in the sky!'), curiosity ('Can we go to the top?', 'Do you do all the jobs, Miss Rabbit?'), describing what she sees ('I can see a big green lady with an ice cream'), and playfully mimicking ('Look at me! I'm the Statue of Liberty!').

Airplane.description: A white and blue airplane with red wings, flying through a blue sky with clouds, its engine humming, and making distinct swoosh, rumble, and tire squeal sounds upon landing.

Yellow Taxi.description: A bright yellow taxi with a black-and-white checkered pattern and a 'TAXI' sign on the roof, driven by a white rabbit, transporting the Pig family through the city. It makes distinct taxi sounds, including a horn and engine noise.

City Street.description: A busy urban street filled with various vehicles including taxis, buses, trucks, and cars, lined with buildings and traffic lights, under a clear blue sky, accompanied by city ambient sounds and traffic noise.

Rooftop.description: An elevated platform with a low stone wall, offering a panoramic view of the city skyline, including a tall spired building resembling the Empire State Building.

Rabbit Driver.description: A white rabbit with long ears, initially wearing a yellow hat while driving the taxi, and later a yellow coat and top hat while joining the family in the elevator and on the rooftop. She has an energetic, confident female voice, is identified by Peppa as 'Miss Rabbit,' and acts as an enthusiastic tour guide, announcing stops, guiding the family, and identifying landmarks.

Statue of Liberty.description: A green statue holding a torch and a tablet, standing on a stone base in the middle of the ocean, viewed through the telescope’s circular lens.

Green Bus.description: A green bus with a lion driver, seen passing the yellow taxi on the city street, adding to the urban traffic.

Telescope.description: A large gray telescope on a pedestal, used by Peppa to view the Statue of Liberty, with a circular lens showing the iconic statue against a blue sky.

raw_segments: The minute opens with cheerful, upbeat music as a male narrator announces "America!" over a bright blue sky with colorful text. The scene transitions to the Pig family—Daddy Pig, Mummy Pig, Peppa, and George—watching a superhero cartoon on TV, where a booming voice promotes winning a trip to Hollywood to star in "Vegetables in Space" by finding a golden ticket to "America!" Peppa and George express their excitement with an "Ooh!" The sound of chopping then signals a shift to the kitchen, where Mummy Pig is slicing a yellow fruit while Daddy Pig stirs soup. Peppa asks Mummy Pig if they can find Super Potato's golden ticket. Mummy Pig explains there's only one in the whole world, making it very lucky to find. Suddenly, Mummy Pig, surprised, asks "Oh, what's this in the potato?" as she holds up a yellow packet with a star. Daddy Pig excitedly exclaims, "It's the golden ticket!" Peppa questions, "Does that mean...?" to which Mummy Pig joyfully declares, "Yes, it means we're going to America!" The cheerful music swells as the narrator announces Peppa and her family are flying to America, identifying Miss Rabbit as the pilot. Miss Rabbit, speaking with a British accent, makes a captain's announcement, stating they'll soon be arriving in America, humorously asking if anyone knows where it is, while the Pig family is seen happily seated with seatbelts fastened inside the plane, ready for their adventurous journey.

The video opens with a scenic view of a green hillside and a city skyline partially obscured by clouds, accompanied by a light, cheerful background music and the hum of an airplane engine. Inside the airplane, the Rabbit Pilot, a white rabbit in a blue hat with a feather and a yellow uniform, cheerfully pilots. Daddy Pig, with a deep adult male voice, expresses his excitement, "I've never been before," while Mummy Pig, in an adult female voice, assures him, "You can't miss it. It's really big." Peppa Pig, in a child's voice, asks, "Is that it?" The Rabbit Pilot then enthusiastically calls out, "Hello down there! Are you America?" to which a male voice from Ground Control confirms, "Yes, ma'am, we are." The Rabbit Pilot declares, "Jolly good! We're coming in to land," as the airplane, a white and blue craft with red wings, descends with a swoosh, rumble, and tire squeal, landing on a runway in a bustling city with tall buildings. The Rabbit Pilot then announces, "Welcome to America!" to the excited "Ooh!" of the Pig family. The Pig family—Daddy Pig in a teal shirt and glasses, Mummy Pig in an orange dress, Peppa Pig in a red dress, and George Pig in a blue shirt—emerge from the airport terminal with their colorful suitcases. They are greeted by a bright yellow taxi with a black-and-white checkered pattern and a 'TAXI' sign on top, driven by a white rabbit in a yellow hat, who introduces herself in a friendly, slightly gruff female voice as "Miss Rabbit at your service." Peppa Pig, confused, asks, "You're Miss Rabbit?" to which the taxi driver replies, "Every town needs a Miss Rabbit!" The Rabbit Pilot from the plane bids them farewell, "Bye! Enjoy your trip!" As the family boards the taxi with giggles and excited sounds, Mummy Pig asks, "Is this Hollywood?" Miss Rabbit, the taxi driver, corrects her, "Hollywood? No! This is New York!" The taxi's engine starts, and with a door closing sound, the vehicle drives through a busy city street filled with various vehicles, including other taxis, buses, and trucks, under a clear blue sky, accompanied by city ambient sounds and upbeat, jazzy music. Miss Rabbit acts as a tour guide, exclaiming, "New York! The city that never sleeps!" Peppa Pig, still curious, asks, "Do you never sleep?" as the Pig family appears happy and excited, beginning their journey through the vibrant city.

The segment opens with a vibrant cityscape featuring tall buildings with fire escapes and water tanks, accompanied by the distinct sound of a taxi horn and engine. Peppa Pig, with an excited, high-pitched voice, exclaims "Wow!" and observes, "The buildings are so tall!" as the Pig family—Daddy Pig, Mummy Pig, Peppa Pig, and George Pig—exit a yellow taxi driven by the Rabbit Driver. The Rabbit Driver, an energetic female voice, announces, "First stop of the tour, the Empire State Building!" Peppa, eager, asks, "Can we go to the top?" to which the Rabbit Driver confidently replies, "For sure." Inside a grand building, they enter an elevator with ornate doors, where the Rabbit Driver, now in a yellow coat and top hat, joins them. As the elevator ascends with a distinct ding and whoosh, the Rabbit Driver declares, "Going up!" Peppa, curious, asks, "Do you do all the jobs, Miss Rabbit?" confirming the driver's identity, who playfully responds, "No, just the important ones." Upon exiting to a rooftop with a panoramic city view, Peppa, holding an ice cream, marvels, "Ooh, we're so high in the sky!" Daddy Pig, with a deep, nervous voice, confesses, "Oh, I can't look," as a narrator explains, "Daddy Pig does not like heights." Peppa reassures him, "But there's so much to see, Daddy!" The Rabbit Driver then points out a large telescope, stating, "Yes, with this telescope you can see even more!" Peppa looks through it, smiling, and describes, "I can see a big green lady with an ice cream," which the Rabbit Driver identifies as "That's the Statue of Liberty." Peppa playfully mimics, "Look at me! I'm the Statue of Liberty!" before Daddy Pig makes another nervous sound. The Rabbit Driver urges, "Come on, people, we gotta get movin'!" and the family returns to the street, reboarding the yellow taxi. Daddy Pig, surprised, asks, "Oh, going already?" as the taxi drives off, passing a green bus with a lion driver, adding to the city’s lively atmosphere.

event_blocks.summary: The Pig family, including Daddy Pig, Mummy Pig, Peppa Pig, and George Pig, are in a yellow taxi driven by the Rabbit Driver, whose engine hums and who speaks with a New York-like accent, stating, "if you ain't movin', you ain't going nowhere." The taxi travels through a city street that transforms into a bustling nighttime urban scene akin to Times Square, illuminated by glowing advertisements. Peppa Pig inquires, "Where are we going next, Miss Rabbit?", and the Rabbit Driver announces, "Time Square!" Peppa exclaims, "Look at all the lights, Mummy!", and Mummy Pig observes, "There must be a million light bulbs here." The Rabbit Driver proudly claims it's "the most light-bulb-iest square in all the world!" Peppa notices a billboard and exclaims, "Oh look, there's Super Potato!", as a deep announcer voice promotes "the new movie from Super Potato and Hash Brown, Vegetables in Space!" Peppa excitedly declares, "That's a movie we're going to be in!", and the Rabbit Driver suggests, "you better get straight to Hollywood!" Daddy Pig asks, "Yes, can you take us?", but the Rabbit Driver explains, "I'm afraid not. But I have just the thing to get you there. A motorhome!" The family disembarks onto the sidewalk, observing the lights. Peppa asks, "What's a motorhome?", and the Rabbit Driver describes it as "just like a house... on wheels!" The family gasps, "Ooh!", and approaches a blue taxi stand booth where the Rabbit Driver, now wearing a taxi cap, presents them with keys. The family walks past a red and white bus decorated with flowers, amidst the vibrant city atmosphere characterized by bright lights and animated billboards.

event_blocks.summary: The Pig family, including Daddy Pig, Mummy Pig, Peppa Pig, and George Pig, embarked on a journey from a bustling city street, initially by a red and white bus driven by a Rabbit Driver. After a scenic drive through the city at night, marked by animated billboards and a narrator's observation about New York never sleeping, they transitioned to a bright, rural landscape. The narrator revealed they were in America, en route to Hollywood, with Daddy Pig expressing affection for their motor home. Upon arriving at a roadside diner, they were greeted by a white Cowboy Rabbit, who clarified they were far from Hollywood but offered home cooking. Peppa's excitement for breakfast was met with a "Hooray!" as they entered the diner. Inside, the Cowboy Rabbit, now behind the counter, cooked sunny-side-up eggs on a stove while singing. Mummy Pig ordered eggs over easy, which the Cowboy Rabbit prepared, explaining the cooking process to a curious Peppa. He served Daddy Pig toast with a fried egg, and the family enjoyed the warm, friendly atmosphere of the diner, complete with framed pictures, a coffee machine, and condiment shakers.

The atmosphere is enhanced by upbeat country music with guitar, banjo, and drums, which plays throughout the cooking scene.

Inside, he stands behind the counter, cooking sunny-side-up eggs on a stove while holding a spatula, serving food, and singing cheerfully about cooking eggs ('So what'll it be? Sunny side up or sunny side down? Eggs over easy, no need to frown!', 'Coming right up!', 'Cooking an egg, and shaking a leg. Cooking and shaking, a cooking an egg!'). He also explains cooking methods, saying 'I'll flip the egg over' (with a sound of an egg flipping) and 'I don't flip the egg over'.

raw_segments: The Pig family—Daddy Pig, Mummy Pig, Peppa Pig, and George Pig—begin their journey on a bustling city street, standing beside a red and white bus adorned with flower boxes. Peppa asks, "you want to come too?" as the Rabbit Driver, wearing a yellow coat and top hat, cheerfully responds, "A meat hash brown? Oh, sure. But I'm just so busy. You all have a great time!" The family thanks her, "Thank you, Miss Rabbit!" as the bus horn sounds. As the bus drives through the city, the scene transitions from day to night, showcasing a vibrant skyline filled with colorful, animated billboards featuring whimsical characters. Daddy Pig sighs, "Oh, I'm tired out," and a narrator comments on the city that "never sleeps," making him "very sleepy." The narrator adds, "It has been a very busy day in New York," as the family bids "Good night! Night night!" The narrator explains that "Peppa and her family need a good night's sleep for the journey ahead." The bus continues its journey, eventually leaving the city and driving through a rural landscape under a bright sun, passing a windmill and a water tower. Peppa excitedly exclaims, "The diner!" The narrator reveals, "Peppa and her family are in America, on their way to Hollywood." Daddy Pig, hearing a bus horn, declares, "I love this motor home!" The narrator clarifies, "A motor home is a house that you can drive." Peppa asks, "Are we in Hollywood yet, Daddy Pig?" to which Daddy Pig replies, "Let's ask someone." The family arrives at a roadside diner, where they are greeted by a white Cowboy Rabbit in a brown hat and coat, sitting on a rocking chair with a guitar, playing a cheerful acoustic tune. He greets them with a hearty, "Hello! Well, howdy folks! I'm Miss Rabbit." Peppa, surprised, notes, "Oh, it's another Miss Rabbit!" The Cowboy Rabbit, waving cheerfully, confirms, "Yep, there's a lot of us around. What can I do..." The scene ends with a close-up of the friendly Cowboy Rabbit’s face.

The Pig family—Daddy Pig, Mummy Pig, Peppa Pig, and George Pig—arrive at a rustic roadside diner with a striped awning. Mummy Pig, speaking with a slightly formal female voice, initially asks if they are stopping for gas, then for food, and finally inquires if they are in Hollywood. The Cowboy Rabbit, seated in a green rocking chair outside, wearing a brown cowboy hat, coat, and pink bandana, waves cheerfully and responds with a deep, friendly country-accented male voice, stating, “No, ma'am, you're a long way from Hollywood,” before warmly inviting them to “settle down and get some of that good old home cooking.” Daddy Pig, with a calm male voice, considers stopping for breakfast, prompting an excited “Hooray!” from Peppa Pig. The scene transitions inside the cozy diner, which features a checkered floor, wooden walls, and a counter with red-and-white checkered trim, where the Cowboy Rabbit is now behind the counter. Upbeat country music with guitar, banjo, and drums begins to play as he cooks sunny-side-up eggs on a stove, singing cheerfully, “So what'll it be? Sunny side up or sunny side down? Eggs over easy, no need to frown!” Mummy Pig requests, “Eggs over easy, please,” and the Cowboy Rabbit responds, “Coming right up!” while continuing to sing about “Cooking an egg, and shaking a leg.” Peppa Pig, curious, asks, “What's eggs over easy?”, to which the Cowboy Rabbit explains, “I'll flip the egg over,” accompanied by the distinct sound of an egg flipping. He then serves a plate of toast topped with a fried egg to Daddy Pig, who accepts it with a smile. Peppa thanks him and then asks, “And what's sunny side up?”, prompting the Cowboy Rabbit to clarify, “I don't flip the egg over.” The family watches with delight amidst the warm, friendly atmosphere, with framed pictures on the wall, including one of the Banana Superhero, and a coffee machine and condiments visible on the counter.

event_blocks.summary: Inside the Roadside Diner, the Cowboy Rabbit, attired in a brown cowboy hat, coat, and pink bandana, cooks sunny-side-up eggs on a gray stove while Peppa Pig, George Pig, Mummy Pig, and Daddy Pig observe. Peppa requests, "Sunny side up, please!" and George echoes, "And me!" The Cowboy Rabbit performs a country song, "Cookin' an egg, and shakin' a leg," as he expertly flips sizzling eggs with a spatula, serving toast topped with fried eggs to Peppa and George, who express their delight. Daddy Pig also receives his toast with egg, expressing satisfaction with a "Mmm" and "Thank you. That was delicious." His attempt to relax is interrupted by the Cowboy Rabbit's query, "So, who likes dancing?" to which Peppa eagerly responds, "Me!" The setting shifts to a vibrant barn dance under colorful string lights and bunting, where the Cowboy Rabbit introduces "Mr. Bob Bobcat and his band," comprising a badger on double bass, a fox on banjo, and a pig on violin. The band performs a lively tune, singing, "All join hands and step to the right. Keep on steppin' and make it tight," as the Pig family, now sporting cowboy hats, joins other animal guests dancing on the straw-covered floor. Peppa urges, "Let's all join in!" and the Cowboy Rabbit distributes hats, stating, "Y'all be needing these." The air buzzes with the band's music about swinging partners, punctuated by excited pig squeals and exclamations of "Woo-hoo!" and "Yee-haw!" from the revelers.

event_blocks.summary: Inside a lively barn dance, Peppa Pig asks George Pig if he wants to sing, and he eagerly agrees. Upbeat country music starts as Peppa Pig and George Pig, both wearing cowboy hats, sing into a microphone on stage, instructing the audience to "Jump up and down like you're in a puddle" and "be a dinosaur," accompanied by a deep growling voice and a loud dinosaur roar. Daddy Pig, observing with Mummy Pig and other dancing animal friends, chuckles, "Ho ho, well I never done a square dance like that before." The scene shifts outdoors to a monster truck show under a blue sky, where a wolf driver, also in a cowboy hat, requests, "Y'all keep the noise down please! We can't hear our monster trucks." Peppa Pig exclaims "Monster trucks!" amidst loud engine revving and roaring. A narrator introduces a monster truck, and Peppa Pig observes, "Wow! Those big wheels have got a car on top of them!" The narrator announces Mr. Coyote will jump over a muddy puddle, and the red-orange monster truck, driven by the wolf driver, successfully jumps over a ramp, landing with a loud thud and a dust cloud, drawing cheers. The wolf driver comments, "That looks fun," before Peppa Pig invites Daddy Pig, "You can have a go, Daddy Pig!" Daddy Pig calmly accepts, "Oh, okay," and drives the red-orange monster truck past a sheriff sign and a Banana Superhero Poster, as Peppa Pig cheers "Hooray!" and the monster truck engine roars.

raw_segments: The Pig family, Daddy Pig, Mummy Pig, Peppa, and George, journey through a vast desert in their red and white camper van, all sporting cowboy hats. Daddy Pig, driving and holding a map, remarks on the "miles and miles" they've traveled, while Peppa, with a high-pitched voice, asks if they're "nearly there yet." Mummy Pig, in a gentle tone, explains that "America is a very big country." Suddenly, Daddy Pig shouts "Stop!" as they arrive at a cliff edge. Peppa excitedly exclaims, "It's Mr. Buffalo again!" as they exit the van and gather around a Construction Bull. The bull, with a deep, gruff voice, corrects her, stating, "I'm not Mr. Buffalo, I'm Mr. Bison." Peppa then inquisitively asks if he's "digging up the road," to which Mr. Bison dramatically reveals, "No, miss. This here is a canyon," accompanied by a dramatic sound effect. The scene opens to a vast canyon with towering orange rock cliffs. Peppa gasps, "Ooh, that's a big hole!" Mr. Bison proudly details its immense size: "277 miles long, 18 miles wide, one mile deep." Daddy Pig, surprised, asks if he "dug that hole all by yourself," but Mr. Bison clarifies that the canyon "was carved out by a river a long time ago." He then directs them to an information desk for more details. Later, the family approaches a roadside souvenir stand, where a cheerful Rabbit Driver, who introduces herself as "Miss Rabbit," greets them. The stand is adorned with flags and a star-shaped wind chime, set against the warm desert backdrop of sand, cacti, and a bright yellow sun.

The Pig family, dressed in cowboy hats—Daddy Pig in a black hat, Mummy Pig in brown, Peppa in red, and George in dark gray—stands before a wooden souvenir stand in a vibrant desert landscape. Peppa exclaims, "Oh, it's another Miss Rabbit!", identifying the Rabbit Driver, who wears a green shirt and blue hat, as she operates the stand. Miss Rabbit, with a cheerful voice, offers them a canyon tour, to which the entire Pig family excitedly responds, "Yes, please!" She then instructs them to "hop in," and the family boards a blue helicopter. The helicopter lifts off with distinct whirring and whooshing sounds, flying over the arid desert with orange rock formations and cacti under a bright yellow sun. Peppa expresses "Wow!" at the view, and Miss Rabbit describes the "amazing" ancient rocks, prompting George to excitedly repeat "Dinosaur!" and make a "Roar!" sound. As they fly through a canyon, a large eagle with white and black feathers soars past, its screech echoing, which Miss Rabbit points out. Miss Rabbit then announces the next part of the tour is "by boat," and George questions, "Boat?". The helicopter descends toward a river, deploying a ladder for their "convenience." Daddy Pig, with a questioning voice, asks if they are to "climb down," to which Miss Rabbit confirms, "Down you go!" Daddy Pig climbs down the ladder, landing with a splash on a yellow inflatable raft, where he joins the smiling family as the helicopter hovers above, and he asks, "What do we do now?", with Miss Rabbit instructing them to "sit back and go with the..." as the segment ends. Throughout, light, adventurous background music accompanies their journey.

event_blocks.summary: The Rabbit Driver piloted a blue helicopter through a bright blue sky over a desert landscape, with an excited 'Whoa!' heard as the helicopter descended. Daddy Pig warned, 'Just watch out for the rapids!' The Pig family—Daddy Pig, Mummy Pig, Peppa, and George—joyfully rode a bright yellow inflatable raft down a blue river through a canyon, with screams, laughter, and splashing sounds accompanying their journey. Peppa exclaimed, 'It's like a big grab ride!' as they navigated past rocky cliffs and small green bushes. Upon reaching a sandy shore near a dark cave entrance, Peppa declared, 'That was the best fun ever!' and Daddy Pig agreed, 'Yes, lots of fun.' Peppa spotted the caves, and Daddy Pig marveled, 'Wow, just think. We might be the first to ever enter these caves!' Inside the cave, they discovered a souvenir stand operated by Miss Rabbit, who, dressed in a green jacket and blue hat, called out, 'Postcards! Drinks! Snacks!' Miss Rabbit welcomed them to the 'Canyon Caves' and invited them to 'Come and have a look.' She explained that the ancient rock paintings, illuminated by a beam of sunlight and featuring a large bird and other symbols, 'were homes for the people who lived here a long time ago' and that 'They drew pictures of all the animals that lived here.' Peppa excitedly pointed out, 'Look, there's the eagle!' with an 'Ooh.' Miss Rabbit announced, 'And that is the end of the tour.' Peppa thanked her, 'Thank you, Miss Rabbit!' and Miss Rabbit replied, 'My pleasure. Where are you off to now?' The family exited the cave, smiling, and posed happily beside a large poster featuring the Banana Superhero and a smiling yellow sponge character, with Miss Rabbit standing beside them under the warm desert sun, as Daddy Pig began to say, 'We're going...'

event_blocks.summary: The Pig family—Daddy Pig, Mummy Pig, Peppa Pig, and George Pig—embarked on a Hollywood adventure, initially admiring a Banana Superhero poster and expressing a desire to be in a movie with Super Potato and Hash Brown. After a polite refusal from a busy Rabbit Driver, they journeyed to Hollywood in their red and white camper van, encountering a Police Rabbit Officer who initially stopped them for a traffic violation before directing them towards the stars on the sidewalk. Upon arriving at a building, they met the Banana Superhero, now identified as Super Potato, and the Yellow Sponge Character, Hash Brown, who revealed they had won tickets to be in the movie "Vegetables in Space." The family then transitioned to a movie studio set, first on a stage with a desert backdrop, then in a spaceship interior, and finally on a moon-like surface under a starry sky, all while dressed in green broccoli costumes. During filming, an unexpected event occurred: naughty carrots began taking over the galaxy, prompting Super Potato and Hash Brown to embark on a mission to save the universe. They landed their carrot-shaped spaceship on the Moon, where they were met by several Miss Rabbits, who, revealed to be fans of Hash Brown, helped them by eating the overwhelming number of carrots. With the universe saved, Miss Rabbit offered to take them home. The Pig family boarded a white and blue airplane piloted by Miss Rabbit, reflecting on their amazing time in America as they flew under a shining sun.

raw_segments: The video opens with the Pig family—Daddy Pig, Mummy Pig, Peppa Pig, and George Pig—standing outside a cave in a desert landscape, admiring a large poster of the Banana Superhero. Peppa Pig, in her high-pitched, enthusiastic voice, declares her excitement "to be in a movie with Super Potato and Hash Brown," a sentiment echoed by Mummy Pig, who exclaims, "Wow! I would love to be in a movie with Hash Brown." Peppa invites the Rabbit Driver, wearing a green jacket and cap, to join them, but he politely declines in a friendly, slightly formal voice, stating, "Oh, that's very kind, but I'm so busy here. You have a great time in Hollywood." George Pig, with a simple, child-like "We will," bids him "Bye!" along with Peppa, as the Rabbit Driver waves them off, saying, "Bye! Enjoy Hollywood!" An upbeat tune begins as a narrator announces, "Peppa and her family are on their way to Hollywood." The family then drives their red and white camper van through a sunny desert landscape with orange rock formations. Peppa joyfully shouts "Hollywood!" as the narrator reiterates, "Peppa and her family are in America, on their way to Hollywood." As they enter a bustling city street labeled 'Hollywood,' filled with colorful cars and palm trees, Peppa asks, "Oh, are we nearly there yet?" Daddy Pig, looking slightly nervous, responds in a deep, slightly bumbling voice, "I don't know. Let's stop and look at the map," followed by the distinct sound of the van braking sharply. A police siren wails as a Police Rabbit Officer, in a blue uniform, stops their van. Daddy Pig, hearing Peppa exclaim, "It's another Miss Rabbit!", asks, "Is everything all right, Miss Rabbit?" The officer, with a firm, official voice, questions, "Sir, did you know that you may only stop on a freeway if it is an emergency?" Peppa begins to protest, "But it is an emer..." as the officer gestures towards a billboard featuring the Banana Superhero.

The Pig family arrives in Hollywood, their red and white camper van driving along a palm-lined city street with billboards, accompanied by upbeat, adventurous music. They are stopped by a cheerful Police Rabbit Officer on a motorcycle, who, in a helpful voice, directs them to "hang a right" and "head straight on until you see the stars." Peppa Pig questions, "But it's daytime," to which the officer explains, "The stars aren't in the sky, they're on the ground!" The family, excited, thanks "Mr. Rabbit" as the van continues, passing a large billboard featuring the Banana Superhero, now identified as "Super Potato," with floating carrots and a 'HOLLYWOOD' sign. Peppa exclaims, "We've got to look for the stars," and George excitedly points out, "Star!" Daddy Pig confirms, "George has seen a star," as they pass a red fire hydrant and the star-decorated sidewalk. They arrive at a grand building, where the Banana Superhero, in a blue mask and yellow cape, is posing for photos with fans. With a booming, heroic voice, he declares, "Am I a bird? Am I a plane? No! I'm a potato!" He is joined by a large, smiling yellow sponge character, who introduces himself with a deep voice as "Hash Brown." Peppa Pig then introduces herself, and Mummy Pig explains they've won tickets to be in "Super Potato's new movie, Vegetables in Space!" The superhero, Super Potato, then commands, "Then let's get to the studio!" as the Pig family joins them on the star-studded sidewalk for photos under clear blue skies, amidst a celebratory Hollywood atmosphere.

The video opens with the Pig family—Daddy Pig, Mummy Pig, Peppa Pig, and George Pig—alongside Banana Superhero and the Yellow Sponge Character, standing on a stage-like set with a desert backdrop. A male voice announces, "You've got a movie to make," and then, "Here is the movie studio," accompanied by cheerful orchestral music. The scene transitions to a wide shot of a stage with palm trees, a rocket, and a space backdrop, as the male voice declares, "This is where we make the movie." The group then appears on a moon-like surface under a starry sky, with Earth and Saturn visible, prompting Peppa Pig to exclaim, "Wow! It's like we're really in space!" The male voice instructs, "That's right. Time to put on your costumes," as the Pig family is now dressed in green broccoli costumes, standing with Banana Superhero and the Yellow Sponge Character. A narrator confirms, "Peppa and her family are dressed up as broccoli." George Pig giggles, telling Mummy Pig, "You look funny, Mummy Broccoli!" to which Mummy Pig playfully responds, "So do you, Peppa Broccoli!" Daddy Pig then shushes them, sternly stating, "Shhh! No talking on set. We are about to start filming my movie, Vegetables in Space." He dramatically calls out, "Lights!" (accompanied by a click), "Camera!" (with a whirring sound), and "Action!" (with a clap). The scene shifts to the interior of a spaceship, where Banana Superhero is at the controls, looking surprised, and the Yellow Sponge Character sits beside him, looking concerned. The Pig family in broccoli costumes appears worried in the background as carrots float past the window. A dramatic voiceover declares, "Attention! The galaxy is being taken over by a bunch of naughty carrots." As the spaceship’s lights flicker, a character exclaims, "Not the carrots!" The voiceover confirms, "Yes, the naughty carrot bunch." Then, a heroic voice announces, "I, Super Potato, am here to save the day," followed by another, "And I, Hash Brown, will save the day too!" as the group reacts to the unexpected space adventure.

Inside the spaceship cockpit, Banana Superhero, wearing a blue mask and yellow cape, pilots with a cheerful expression, while the Yellow Sponge Character sits beside him, looking concerned and asking, "Um, what do we do?" Banana Superhero, identified as "Super Potato," confidently replies, "You are the vegetables in space. You have to cheer when we save the day!" The Yellow Sponge Character responds with an "Oh, okay." Through the circular window, floating carrots drift past in space, causing surprise among the Pig family—Daddy Pig, Mummy Pig, Peppa Pig, and George Pig—who are all dressed in green broccoli costumes and appear worried. Mummy Pig asks, "How are you going to save the day, Super Potato?" to which Banana Superhero admits, "Uh, we haven't thought of that yet." Dramatic music builds as the Yellow Sponge Character exclaims, "Oh no! The naughty carrots will destroy the universe!" Daddy Pig adds, "If only there was some way of getting rid of them!" and Peppa Pig chimes in, "We can't eat the carrots!" Daddy Pig replies, "But there are too many!" The scene cuts to an exterior view of the red, carrot-shaped spaceship flying through space with carrots floating around it. A vehicle sound signals its landing on a gray, cratered moon surface under a starry sky, with Earth and Saturn visible. As the Pig family, still in their broccoli costumes, steps out, they are greeted by a chorus of "Hello!" and "Hello there!" from a group of four white rabbits. The Yellow Sponge Character asks, "What's this?" and Rabbit Driver, in a blue police uniform, announces, "There are some fans here to see Hash Brown!" Banana Superhero identifies them: "It is Miss Rabbit, Miss Rabbit, Miss Rabbit, and Miss Rabbit!" The rabbits, including a cowboy rabbit, cheer "Hooray!" and declare, "It's the Miss Rabbits! We decided to take the day off for a change. We couldn't miss Hash Brown. He's our favorite potato starch-based movie star!" Banana Superhero, now identified as "Hash Brown," chuckles, "You're too kind," as he and the Yellow Sponge Character also exit the spaceship, standing amidst a field of floating carrots. The group gathers together, smiling, as carrots continue to float around them in the cosmic setting, accompanied by a final vehicle sound.

The scene opens on the Moon's starry surface, where Daddy, Mummy, Peppa, and George Pig, all in green broccoli costumes, stand amidst scattered carrots, looking surprised. A deep male voice, likely Banana Superhero, asks, "could you help us save the universe?" as a group of four rabbits, dressed as a police officer, a cowboy, a detective, and a magician, emerge from behind a curtain, each holding a carrot. Peppa Pig, with her distinct child's voice, enthusiastically declares, "We have to eat the carrots!" An energetic male rabbit voice confirms, "Sure thing, we're rabbits. We love carrots," followed by sounds of happy chewing. Another male rabbit voice adds, "Save some for me! I love carrots too." Peppa then exclaims, "Look, it's all this rabbit!" as a rabbit in a yellow dress and blue hat with a feather steps forward, smiling and holding a carrot, identified as Miss Rabbit. More chewing sounds and a rabbit saying "Mmm, yummy" are heard. The scene briefly shifts to a spaceship cockpit where Banana Superhero, in his blue mask and yellow cape, stands beside a concerned Yellow Sponge Character, with floating carrots visible outside the window. Back on the Moon, the Pig family and rabbits are joined by Banana Superhero and the Yellow Sponge Character, all appearing joyful and united on the cratered surface with Earth and Saturn in the background. The deep male voice (Banana Superhero) triumphantly announces, "We did it! The universe is saved!" followed by a group "Hooray!" He then adds, "Thanks to Peppa Pig," and Peppa proudly states, "And all the Miss Rabbit!" The group responds, "You're welcome!" Miss Rabbit, with a gentle, friendly female voice, then says, "Actually, I'm here to take you home." Peppa, surprised, asks, "Oh, already?" before bidding, "Bye-bye everyone!" to which the group replies, "Bye!" The scene transitions to a bright blue sky with white clouds, accompanied by the sound of an airplane engine. A white and blue airplane with red wings flies, piloted by Miss Rabbit, now in a blue hat with a feather and a yellow uniform. Inside, the Pig family and Miss Rabbit are seated, smiling, with Daddy Pig in a cowboy hat and glasses, Mummy Pig in an orange dress, Peppa in a red dress, and George still in his green broccoli costume. Miss Rabbit asks Peppa, "Have you had a good time in America, Peppa?" Peppa enthusiastically replies, "Yes! It's been amazing!" Miss Rabbit inquires, "What was the best bit?" and Peppa exclaims, "Everything!" The airplane continues flying under a shining sun, with the characters looking happy and content, as a calm male narrator concludes, "Peppa has had a wonderful time in America," followed by laughter.
